name: Saryuja's Shackles
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>枷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Link Monster your opponent controls or is in their GY; draw cards equal to its Link Rating, then, if you have 2 or more cards in your hand, place 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your Deck in any order. You can only activate 1 "Saryuja's Shackles" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Link Monster your opponent controls or is in their GY; draw cards equal to its Link Rating, then, if you have 2 or more cards in your hand, place 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your Deck in any order. You can only activate 1 "Saryuja's Shackles" per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
